description_long: This bungalow features a modern, open-plan layout with large floor-to-ceiling windows on multiple sides, allowing for ample natural light. The structure is surrounded by dense, mature trees and shrubbery, providing privacy and a natural aesthetic. The exterior walls are finished in a clean white, contrasting with the dark window frames and lush greenery. The interior is visible through the windows, revealing distinct rooms including a bedroom, living area, and dining space, each furnished with contemporary decor. The entrance is marked by a paved walkway leading up to the front, partially obscured by the trees. The flat roof and geometric lines emphasize a minimalist, modern architectural style.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with large windows, white exterior walls, and surrounded by dense greenery. The flat roof and open-plan interior highlight its contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a clear view of the interior rooms, with dense trees behind the building.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the bungalow, the arrangement of interior spaces, and the extensive greenery covering one side.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by tall, dense trees, with only the upper part of the bungalow visible above the foliage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, the side entrance, and the continuation of the tree coverage.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large floor-to-ceiling windows on multiple sides
